title: Character Card V2
description: Character Card V2 (chara_card_v2) — hand-translated to JSON Schema from the official TypeScript spec: https://github.com/malfoyslastname/character-card-spec-v2/blob/main/spec_v2.md. StoryTelling app-specific data lives in data.extensions.storytelling. The scenario id is derived from the filename, not stored in the card.

name.description: Card name — the value of the {{char}} macro.

description.description: Main card content — injected into every prompt, after the system prompts. Also shown in the Scenario tab.

personality.description: Short personality summary. Injected as "{{char}}'s personality: ..." when non-empty.

scenario.description: Circumstances and context of the story. Injected as "Scenario: ..." when non-empty.

first_mes.description: Opening text — seeded as the first assistant message.

mes_example.description: Example dialogue, conversations separated by <START>. Injected as example text when non-empty.

creator_notes.description: UI-only pitch shown on the setup screen. Never included in the prompt.

system_prompt.description: Scenario system prompt (world rules) — appended AFTER the app's global system prompt. {{original}} is replaced with an empty string since the global prompt is always included.

post_history_instructions.description: Injected as a system message AFTER the chat history — the strongest instruction slot.

alternate_greetings.description: Alternative first_mes values — selectable via dropdown while the game is fresh (no turns yet).

character_book.description: Embedded lorebook — becomes the game's world cards.

keys.description: Trigger keywords. Empty array = always injected (pinned).

extensions.description: App-specific data. Other applications must preserve unknown keys.

icon.description: Emoji shown on the setup screen.

mainCharacters.description: Suggested player characters — pre-fill the character form.
